prompt_task: match.genotypes.q1.tar.gz contains plink genotype files in hg38 for 4 individuals of European ancestry (match.genotypes.1.1.*) and a shuffled metadata table (match.genotypes.1.2.csv) for the same 4 individuals. Please provide the most likely mapping from the IIDs in the plink files to the sample IDs in the metadata file. Format your answer as follows: “SAMPLE001,MIX1;SAMPLE002,MIX2;SAMPLE003,MIX3;SAMPLE004,MIX4”. IIDs should be in lexicographic order. You are also given genotypes for an additional set of European ancestry individuals (match.genotypes.1.3.*), which could be helpful. The individuals contained in match.genotypes.1.1.* are non-overlapping with match.genotypes.1.3.*. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
